attacking_style: Launches decisive solo attacks on steep final climbs (12%+ gradient) with 3km remaining, timing moves before tactical hesitation sets in among rivals.
team_tactics: Operates from breakaway positions rather than relying on team support; self-sufficient attacker who reads tactical moments independently.
terrain_preference: Excels on steep gradient finishes (12%+) where punchy climbing power creates separation. Short, explosive final climbs suit his style best.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify clear weaknesses; likely struggles when breakaways are controlled or on sustained steady-gradient climbs lacking tactical inflection points.
key_patterns: Attacks from breakaways on final categorized climbs, not from peloton
Targets steep gradient sections (12%+) for acceleration rather than moderate gradients
Times attacks with 3km remaining, exploiting tactical hesitation among breakaway companions
form_trajectory: unknown: Single observation from 2019 Vuelta provides snapshot of capability but no trajectory data available
